text.title: team-development Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for team-development as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Tuckman stage labels as an excuse for inaction ("we're just Storming, it will pass").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Storming does not self-resolve without facilitation; teams that skip active mediation can stay in Storming for months and lose key contributors.

failure-mode.description: Applying Tuckman to distributed async-only teams without adjustment.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The model assumes synchronous dynamics; async teams show attenuated stage signals and require additional indicators (response lag, async thread sentiment).

failure-mode.description: Skipping team building because "there's no time."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Dysfunction deferred costs more time than investment avoided; unresolved Storming can freeze a team for months.

failure-mode.description: One-size-fits-all management style across all team members.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different Tuckman stages and different experience levels require different leadership approaches; uniform style over-manages high performers and under-supports strugglers.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Individual blame destroys psychological safety and repeats the failure; root cause is almost always process, tooling, or system design.

failure-mode.description: LLMs over-pattern-match Tuckman labels without evidence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require evidence quotes in the diagnosis prompt to avoid false classifications.

failure-mode.description: Letting an agent auto-publish a retro without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Humans must redact attribution and tone before sharing.

failure-mode.description: Agents writing 1-on-1 notes verbatim into shared docs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Privacy boundary violation; separate personal feedback from team-level insights.

failure-mode.description: Agents generating a generic charter instead of citing team incidents.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force them to cite the team's actual incidents and patterns to ground the charter in reality.

failure-mode.description: Skills-matrix scoring by an agent without evidence backing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Must be tied to PRs, incidents, or code reviews; hallucinated scores hide critical gaps.
